data: Builder is a tool that implements the builder specification. This specification in a .builder.yaml file can be customized to suit your needs.
Core configuration options that apply across the entire Builder pipeline, including templates, deployment, and project-settings.

The project name is used in templates and other places where the project name is needed. It is inferred from the project directory name by default.
.builder.yamlname: myproject
Everything you need to go from zero to your first project with Builder.

Builder’s goal is to make it easy to design, build, and release software in the age of AI. It has a focus on websites and web applications as the quickest way to live in an ever evolving econosystem of new things.
Builder expects a couple of things:
a .builder.yaml file with the configuration (see the customization section for more info) a clean working tree willingness to create new tools And that’s it.
Putting it simply, Builder is a tool to build in the age of AI.
